docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGIA, RUBEN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN SERVED NOV-17-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGIA, RUBEN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN SERVED NOV-17-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGIA, RUBEN
DECLARATION OF SUSAN PARKINSON IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR DEFAULT RE LOST SUMMONS/COPY OF RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGIA, RUBEN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNGIA, RUBEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 640 CLAY STREET, #221, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94111, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGIA, RUBEN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $24.28 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGIA, RUBEN
